summary: Excellent audience recording of the 9/7/85 Red Rocks show with crisp sound and standout performances of Frozen Logger, Shakedown Street and Crazy Fingers.
review: The remastered AUD capture delivers clear, punchy audio that lets listeners hear every smile on the speakers, while the band offers a light‑hearted, high‑energy set highlighted by Frozen Logger, Shakedown Street and an inspired Crazy Fingers.  Most fans praise the flow of the second set, though a few note rushed pacing and vocal wear from Jerry.

ai_rating.rationale: Strong musical performance with multiple standout songs and consistently praised sound quality; isolated criticisms are outweighed by the majority of enthusiastic 5‑star reviews.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Excellent clarity and crispness noted across reviews, strong low‑end presence (some say a bit loud), overall very listenable AUD source.

show_quality.setlist_flow: The second set is praised for its pure Dead goodness and smooth flow, though one reviewer felt it was slightly rushed compared to classic shows.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Vocals noted as deteriorating by some reviewers, but slide‑guitar work in the first set receives high praise.
